name: HOKO
description: Mobile deep linking platform with smart links, deferred deep links and attribution dashboard for app marketers.

seo.title: HOKO — Mobile Attribution / MMP
seo.meta_description: HOKO: Mobile deep linking platform with smart links, deferred deep links and attribution dashboard for app marketers.

when_to_use: Deferred deep link attribution for app install campaigns from web
Smart link routing to App Store, Google Play, or web based on device
App-to-web and web-to-app deep link flows for re-engagement campaigns
Attribution dashboard linking deep link clicks to post-install conversions

pros: Deep linking and deferred links built for app marketers
Attribution dashboard bundled with smart links
cons: Smaller ecosystem than Branch or AppsFlyer OneLink
Fewer partner integrations for paid media
SKAN tooling less mature than Tier-1 MMPs
Product cadence and roadmap less transparent
review.verdict: Useful deep-link and attribution bundle for small app teams, but Branch remains the safer default at scale.
review.best_for: Small and mid-size app teams needing deep linking plus light attribution in one tool.
review.not_for: Enterprise apps needing the largest integration catalog and SLA guarantees.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium tier; no explicit peak-lock or reserved-capacity evidence.
